section:
KTN::AlgoBaseV3 Class Reference KTN::AlgoBaseV3
The base class for algos, implementing market data callbacks and session management.
#include <AlgoBaseV3.hpp>
Inheritance diagram for KTN::AlgoBaseV3:
Public Member Functions
AlgoBaseV3 (AlgoInitializer params)
Constructs a new AlgoBaseV3 object.
virtual ~AlgoBaseV3 ()
Destructor for AlgoBaseV3.
virtual void Print ()
Prints information about the algorithm instance.
std::string GUID ()
Returns the globally unique identifier (GUID) of the algorithm.
void Poll ()
Polls the system for events.
virtual void onJson (std::string json)=0
Processes a JSON-formatted string.
virtual void onEngineJson (EngineCommand &cmd)
Processes algo engine-specific commands.
virtual void onLaunch (std::string json)=0
Triggered when the algorithm is launched.
virtual void onCalculate ()=0
Performs calculation logic for the algorithm.
virtual void onTrade (int index, double price, double size, int aggressor)
Handles a trade event.
virtual void onMktData (int index)
Handles market data updates.
virtual void onHeartbeat (int msgseqnum)
Handles session heartbeat events.
virtual void onSessionStatus (std::string exch, int mktsegid, int protocol, std::string desc, std::string state)
Handles session status updates.
void onSpreadLegOrderExecution (KTN::Order &ord)
Executes spread leg orders.
virtual void minOrderAck (KTN::OrderPod &ord) override
This method is called when a minimum order acknowledgement is received.
virtual void minOrderCancel (KTN::OrderPod &ord) override
This method is called when a minimum order cancellation is received.
virtual void minOrderModify (KTN::OrderPod &ord) override
This method is called when a minimum order modification is received.
virtual void minOrderExecution (KTN::OrderPod &ord, bool hedgeSent) override
This method is called when a minimum order execution is received.
virtual void minOrderReject (KTN::OrderPod &ord, const std::string &text)
Handles order rejection events.
virtual void minOrderCancelReject (KTN::OrderPod &ord, const std::string &text)
virtual void minOrderCancelReplaceReject (KTN::OrderPod &ord, const std::string &text)
virtual void onHedgeOrderSent (char *clordid, uint64_t reqid, int32_t secid, KOrderSide::Enum side, uint32_t qty, int32_t price9, uint16_t instindex)
Handles hedge order sent events.
virtual void onOrderSent (char *clordid, uint64_t reqid, int32_t secid, KOrderSide::Enum side, uint32_t qty, int32_t price, KOrderAlgoTrigger::Enum trig)
Handles order sent events.
virtual void Enable (bool bEnable)=0
Enables or disables the algorithm.
virtual void ResetPosition ()
Resets the algorithm's position.
virtual void ToggleCommand (int id)
Toggles a specific command by ID.
virtual void Shutdown ()
Shuts down the algorithm.
virtual void Restart ()
Restarts the algorithm.
virtual void CancelAllOrders ()
Cancels all orders.
virtual void OrderReceived (KTN::Order &ord, int index)
Processes received order events.
virtual void OrderMinUpdate (KTN::OrderPod &ord)
Processes updates for an order. OrderMin is a minimal order object.
void shutdownHandler ()
Shuts down the algorithm handler.
virtual void onMktDataBidAsk (const algomd &md)
Handles bid-ask market data updates.
virtual void onMktDataTrade (const algomd &md)
Handles trade market data updates.
Public Member Functions inherited from KTN::AlgoMktDataCallback
AlgoMktDataCallback ()
Default constructor for AlgoMktDataCallback.
virtual ~AlgoMktDataCallback ()
Virtual destructor for AlgoMktDataCallback.
virtual void onStateChange (int state)
This method is called when the state of the algorithm changes.
Public Member Functions inherited from KTN::SessionCallback
virtual void onSessionStatus (string exch, int mktsegid, int protocol, string desc, string state)=0
This method is called when the session status changes.
virtual void minOrderReject (KTN::OrderPod &ord, const string &text)=0
This method is called when a minimum order rejection is received.
virtual void minOrderCancelReject (KTN::OrderPod &ord, const string &text)=0
This method is called when a minimum order cancellation rejection is received.
virtual void minOrderCancelReplaceReject (KTN::OrderPod &ord, const string &text)=0
This method is called when a minimum order cancel/replace rejection is received.

int32_t getCertSecId (std::string symbol)
int32_t getProdSecIdFromCert (long secid)

bool _MKT_DATA_OK

bool _CAN_TRADE
bool _HANDLER_STARTED

double _TOTALEXEC

int _CORE
bool _VERBOSE
std::string m_Name
Detailed Description
The base class for algos, implementing market data callbacks and session management.
This class handles common aspects of algos such as market data callbacks, order management, and session status updates. It is designed to be extended with specific implementations of algorithmic logic.
Constructor & Destructor Documentation
AlgoBaseV3() AlgoBaseV3KTN::AlgoBaseV3 KTN::AlgoBaseV3AlgoBaseV3
KTN::AlgoBaseV3::AlgoBaseV3 (AlgoInitializer params)[explicit]
Constructs a new AlgoBaseV3 object.
Parameters
params
Initialization parameters for the algorithm.
References Settings::get(), CmeSettingsHelper::GetBool(), Settings::getInteger(), AlgoInitializer::guid, KT01::MSGW::CmeMsgw::LoadProductGatewayFile(), algometa::Source, KtnCmeMdpV4::Start(), and KtnCmeMdpV4::Subscribe().

onJson() onJsonKTN::AlgoBaseV3 KTN::AlgoBaseV3onJson
virtual void KTN::AlgoBaseV3::onJson (std::string json)[pure virtual]
Processes a JSON-formatted string.
Parameters
json
A JSON-formatted string representing algo parameters.
Note
This is a pure virtual function that must be implemented by derived classes.
Implemented in KTN::AutoHedgeOB, KTN::MultiSpreaderV3, KTN::PLWatcher, KTN::Skewer, KTN::SkewTrader, KTN::SqueezerOB, KTN::Stacker, KTN::StackerTimer, KTN::Twap, and KTN::Waves.
